name: MCPApp - Google Apps Script MCP
what_it_does: MCP server leveraging Google Apps Script for Google Workspace automation, from tanaikech — a prolific Google Apps Script developer. Enables AI agents to execute Apps Script code, automate Google Workspace (Sheets, Docs, Drive, Gmail), and interact with Google's ecosystem through Apps Script's powerful integration capabilities.
use_cases: Automating Google Sheets data processing from AI agents via Apps Script
Executing Google Workspace workflows (Docs, Drive, Gmail) from automation agents
Running custom Apps Script functions from productivity agents
Integrating Google Workspace with AI-driven business automation workflows
not_for: Teams needing native Google Workspace APIs (use Google Workspace MCP instead)
best_when: A Google Workspace team wants AI agents to run Apps Script automation — executing custom scripts, manipulating Sheets data, and orchestrating Workspace workflows through Apps Script's capabilities.
avoid_when: You prefer native Google APIs over Apps Script. Apps Script has quotas and execution limits — evaluate for production workloads. tanaikech is a respected Apps Script expert.

auth.notes: Google OAuth 2.0 required. Apps Script execution requires appropriate Google Workspace scopes.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Google Workspace free tier + Apps Script daily quotas
pricing.paid_tiers: Google Workspace Business for higher quotas
pricing.notes: Google Workspace subscription may be required for business use. Apps Script is free. MCP server is free open source.

performance.rate_limits: Google Apps Script daily quotas apply; 6 min execution limit per script

known_agent_gotchas: Apps Script execution has 6-minute maximum — long-running scripts will timeout
Daily quota limits on Apps Script (requests, email sends, etc.) — monitor usage
OAuth scopes must match Apps Script permissions — review scope configuration carefully
tanaikech is highly regarded in the Apps Script community — expect solid implementation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Google OAuth 2.0. Apps Script runs in Google's environment with workspace data access. OAuth scope restriction critical. Google infrastructure security (SOC2/ISO27001).

security_score_components.security_notes: Google OAuth. Workspace data access via Apps Script. Restrict OAuth scopes. Google infrastructure SOC2/ISO27001.
